predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT sd.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd
JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING mht ON sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = mht.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_MONTH m ON mht.MONTH_ID = m.MONTH_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR y ON m.YEAR_ID = y.YEAR_ID
WHERE y.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
AND sd.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'
AND mht.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 0
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd_urban
    JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING mht_urban ON sd_urban.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = mht_urban.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
    JOIN DIM_MONTH m_urban ON mht_urban.MONTH_ID = m_urban.MONTH_ID
    JOIN DIM_YEAR y_urban ON m_urban.YEAR_ID = y_urban.YEAR_ID
    WHERE y_urban.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
    AND sd_urban.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban'
    AND sd_urban.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID
    AND mht_urban.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 0
);
